nasb.text: Therefore, flee to your place now. I said I would honor you greatly, but behold, the Lord has held you back from honor.”

esv.text: Therefore now flee to your own place. I said, ‘I will certainly honor you,’ but the Lord has held you back from honor.”

cnv.text: 現在你逃回你的地方去吧；我說過我要大大地使你得尊榮，但是耶和華阻止你使你不得尊榮。”

ccb.text: 现在快回家去吧！我说过要给你重赏，但耶和华不让你得到。”
